title: Furry Totems
description:
This texture pack does NOT replace the usual totems. It only replaces them by renaming them.
(Works only with Optifine or CIT Resewn)
body:
# **Furry Totems** --- ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zAMxm4ei/images/07ee810ab44536a5f2403332defdef1d0b221dfd.png) ---
## **Description**
**When renaming totems, they are replaced by furry totems. In the gallery it is written on what and under what renaming it will be replaced. (Works only with Optifine or CIT Resewn)**
